title: Cobblemon Forgebound
description: Forge your legacy. Build your town. Battle for glory.
body:
# **_wellcome to cobblemon forgebound_**

Forge your legacy. Build your town. Battle for glory.

Cobblemon ForgeBound is a civilization-style modpack built for immersive multiplayer experiences, blending Pokémon-inspired gameplay with, farming, roleplay, and seasonal progression. 

What do you mean Cobblemon civilization Style Modpack Well I want to add the ability to alow the players to hire npc for there town. How would this work you might ask? well Thes customisation npc Can be shop keeper, trainers, and gemleaders. Pls Do know This is a lot of work to pls follow to stay toon.
